title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: She found an old photo album by chance.

questions.firstSentence: A famous chef cooked all the dishes.
questions.secondSentence: All the dishes (1) _________ by a famous chef.

questions.firstSentence: He is not as hard-working as his colleague.
She was too tired to go to the party.
questions.secondSentence: She wasn't (1) _________ to go to the party.

questions.firstSentence: He forced the children to tidy their rooms.
She no longer takes the bus to school.
Even though it was cold, they sat outside.
